title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!
